name: Sandpoint 2 Door Cabinet Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Brass-Finish Handles, Wood Frame
description:
The Sandpoint 2-Door Cabinet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee blends style and function to upgrade any room in your home. Made from MDF with a wood frame in a natural hue, this cabinet pairs easily with a variety of other decor. It features two doors with brass-finish handles plus a lower shelf to offer you plenty of storage and display space, and anti-tip anchoring hardware helps keep it upright.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
